seoTitle: Douglas vs Downsfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Douglas and Downsfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Douglas and Downsfield.
heading: Douglas vs Downsfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Douglas, Queensland and Downsfield, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Douglas has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Downsfield (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Douglas or Downsfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Douglas has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Downsfield scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Douglas scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Downsfield scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Douglas or Downsfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Douglas has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
